_meta.note: Generated from a live call to POST /analyze-ticket using a public sample case in QueueStorm_Preli_Sample_Cases.json.

input.complaint: I sent 5000 taka to a wrong number around 2pm today. The number was supposed to be 01712345678 but I think I typed it wrong. The person isn't responding to my call. Please help me get my money back.

output.agent_summary: Customer reports a wrong transfer related to transaction TXN-9101. Evidence verdict: consistent. Severity: high.
output.recommended_next_action: Review transaction TXN-9101 and proceed with standard handling for wrong transfer cases.
output.customer_reply: For your security, our team will verify your account through official channels. Please do not share your PIN, OTP, or password with anyone.
